JavaScript code for Pebble watch faces displaying time and date, with animations using the Rocky framework.


## Files
- **[tictoc~rect~bw.js](tictoc~rect~bw.js.md)**: JavaScript code for a Pebble watch face that displays the current time and date.
- **[tictoc~rect~color.js](tictoc~rect~color.js.md)**: JavaScript code for a watchface that draws and animates clock hands using the Rocky framework.
